collectors.titleDetails: (8 total Queries, 8 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT MONTHNAME(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved FROM `bookings` GROUP BY MONTH(created_at) ORDER BY MIN(created_at) ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT MONTHNAME(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved FROM `bookings` GROUP BY MONTH(created_at) ORDER BY MIN(created_at) ASC
